observations.title: Inconsistent Skill Count Summary in Memory File
observations.note: Skill count summary mixes old and new skill names without clarity
observations.suggestion: Reorganize to show renamed vs legacy skills explicitly for ADR-017 migration tracking
observations.impact: Documentation consistency and migration status visibility

observations.title: Stale File References in Configuration Files
observations.note: Configuration paths reference old devforgeai-development directory instead of implementing-stories
observations.suggestion: Update all phase_file and skill_file paths to point to implementing-stories directory
observations.impact: Configuration loading failure if code attempts to read phase definitions

observations.title: Comprehensive Cross-Reference Updates
observations.note: All memory files (skills-reference, commands-reference, subagents-reference) consistently updated
observations.suggestion: Pattern can be reused for future MVP skill renames per ADR-017

observations.title: Dual-Tree Consistency Maintained
observations.note: Both .claude/ operational and src/ distribution trees updated consistently
observations.suggestion: Continue pattern for future ADR-017 migrations - sync operational and source trees

observations.title: ADR-017 Transition Period Rules Applied Correctly
observations.note: Non-MVP skills correctly retained devforgeai- prefix per ADR-017 transition rules
observations.suggestion: Clear enforcement of partial migration reduces scope creep
observations.impact: Risk mitigation - focused MVP approach reduces breaking changes

observations.title: Documentation Examples Still Reference Old Names
observations.note: src/devforgeai/docs/ contains examples with old skill directory paths
observations.suggestion: Create follow-up story for documentation consistency pass
observations.impact: User confusion if docs reference removed directories (low risk - examples only)

adr_compliance.transition_rules: Non-MVP skills correctly retain devforgeai- prefix

recommendations.title: Fix Configuration File Paths
recommendations.action: Update 9 file path references in src/devforgeai/config/ from devforgeai-development to implementing-stories

recommendations.title: Clarify Skill Count Summary
recommendations.action: Reorganize skill list to show renamed (MVP) vs legacy (non-MVP) skills

recommendations.title: Update Documentation Examples
recommendations.action: Create story to update old skill names in src/devforgeai/docs/ (LOW priority)

metadata.security_risk: LOW - no secrets or security-sensitive content
metadata.maintenance_impact: POSITIVE - reduces system prompt token usage by ~154 tokens per ADR-017
